name: Pappasito's Poblano Soup
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Finely diced red bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart stock pot, melt butter over medium heat.
2. Whisk in flour and simmer, whisking constantly until thickened to a roux.
3. Whisk in cream, milk, and chicken bouillon and cook, stirring frequently or whisking, over medium-low heat until smooth.
4. Heat oil in a large sauté pan over medium heat. Add onion and cook until soft, about 3 minutes.
5. Add garlic and carrots, cook until tender, about 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Add poblanos and cook until tender, about 3 minutes.
7. Add the vegetable mixture to the milk mixture, stir to combine.
8. Stir in salt and black, white, and cayenne peppers, simmer over medium-low heat a few minutes.
9. Add red bell pepper. Simmer for 15 or 20 minutes, stirring frequently.
10. Add cheese and stir until melted. Taste and adjust seasonings if necessary.
11. Serve hot or refrigerate immediately, reheating before serving. Makes six 8 oz servings.
Note: Prepare all vegetables ahead of time. Recipe doubles easily.
